title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Katakuri, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Pudding, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 12:28 AM (32 minutes until the meet-up on cacao Island)

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: Is it possible that Katakuri could lose?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you REALLY asking that...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the beginning, that possibility has been non- existent!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, you idiot!! Big Brother Katakuri is the perfect man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Owwww!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...if I were straw hat, here's what I would do:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we think about his promise to meet his crew on CACAD Island at 1 AM from a different angle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His crew won't arrive until 1 am.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so if I was straw hat, I'd capture the only "key"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to the micro-world, big sister brolee.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And wait for the time to pass...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in either the mirroro-world or on another island....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That makes sense...!! big sis brjlee is missing right now, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right... in other words, he will run away from the duel with Katakuri...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And at 1 am on the dot...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is almost certain that straw hat luffy will appear from this mirror.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see... I agree.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Big Sis Brolee is too clumsy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's why she's so easy to capture...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are all of these people fighters...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Luffy isn't able to lose them as soon as he comes out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it'll be the end of the both of us.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Hey, pudding- chan... when Luffy comes out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll have to part ways right here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DAAazzze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She's so far away!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Can you even hear me!? Pudding- chan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is your fiancee.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Lady pudding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's get married...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tomorrow,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looking back, we sure met in unusual circumstances...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's almost time for us to say goodbye...! Thank you for everything.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... I'm the one who deceived you and tried to kill you...so please don't thank me, san ji-san. I'm the one who should be thankful!! I need to apologise properly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SHUT UP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahaha, well, we're enemies, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wedding was a trap... and although it was all a big show put on by the big mom pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's not it!! That's not it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm glad that my fiancee...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: was you, pudding- chan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Juggghh Hh...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah...No, I wasn't trying to make fun of you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No... don't cry, stop crying!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: H... Hey, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: -San:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a request....!! I have just one last... Request....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
